page.title: B1 Mixed Revision
page.subtitle_html: B1 Mixed Revision collects the core Polyglot English B1 grammar patterns before the final drill.
page.subtitle_text: A compact review page for the final B1 Polyglot drill.

blocks.body: {"level":"B1","intro":"This page gives a short review of the main Polyglot English B1 grammar areas before the final mixed drill.","rules":[{"label":"TENSES AND FUTURE","color":"blue","text":"Review perfect, narrative, future continuous and future perfect patterns.","example":"She has been working. / I will have finished by Friday."},{"label":"SPEECH AND CLAUSES","color":"emerald","text":"Review reported speech and relative clauses with clear word order and punctuation.","example":"He asked if I was tired. / Anna, who lives in Kyiv, works here."},{"label":"MODALS AND LINKS","color":"amber","text":"Review modal deduction, passive with modals, causative forms and contrast linkers.","example":"He must be at home. / Although it was late, we continued."}]}

{"title":"1. What to review before the final drill","items":["Present Perfect Continuous and Past Perfect basics.","Future Continuous and Future Perfect forms.","Passive voice with modals and causative have / get.","Reported questions, commands and requests.","Non-defining relative clauses and contrast linking words.","Wish / if only, third conditional and modal deduction."]}

{"title":"2. Quick final checks","intro":"Use these checks before starting the final mixed lesson.","items":[{"label":"Check 1","title":"Form first","subtitle":"Identify the grammar pattern before choosing tokens."},{"label":"Check 2","title":"Time reference","subtitle":"Check whether the sentence points to past, present or future."},{"label":"Check 3","title":"Clause type","subtitle":"Notice reported clauses, relative clauses and linking words."},{"label":"Check 4","title":"One answer","subtitle":"Build the single canonical B1 answer from the prompt."}]}

{"title":"Related review pages","items":[{"label":"Narrative Tenses","current":false},{"label":"Reported Questions","current":false},{"label":"Modals of Deduction","current":false},{"label":"Linking Words","current":false},{"label":"B1 Mixed Revision","current":true}]}
